    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    C

    calculateDailyLimit(BudgetCycle) - Method in class control.LimitCalculator
    Calculates the recommended daily spending limit for a cycle.
    calculateSpentTotal(int) - Method in class control.LimitCalculator
    Queries the database for the cumulative amount spent in a cycle.
    cancelButton - Variable in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Button that cancels and returns to the dashboard.
    cancelButton - Variable in class ui.SetupScreen
    Button that exits the application (no cycle = no app).
    CARD - Static variable in class util.AppColors
    Card and panel background — slightly lighter than AppColors.BACKGROUND.
    cardLayout - Variable in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Layout manager for switching between settings sub-panels.
    categories - Variable in class util.CategoryPillRenderer
    Ordered list of categories, used to assign consistent colours by index.
    categoriesBtn - Variable in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Sub-nav button for the Categories panel.
    Category - Class in domain
    Represents an expense category used to classify transactions.
    Category(int, String, int) - Constructor for class domain.Category
    Constructs a Category with all fields.
    categoryComboBox - Variable in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Drop-down for selecting the expense category.
    categoryId - Variable in class domain.Expense
    ID of the Category this expense belongs to.
    CategoryPillRenderer - Class in util
    Table cell renderer that draws category names as rounded pill badges, with a consistent colour assigned to each category by index.
    CategoryPillRenderer(List) - Constructor for class util.CategoryPillRenderer
    Constructs a CategoryPillRenderer with the full category list.
    changePinButton - Variable in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Button to change the existing PIN.
    checkThreshold(BudgetCycle) - Method in class control.AlertManager
    Evaluates the cycle's spent percentage and fires the appropriate alert.
    clearFilter() - Method in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Resets all filters to the "All" state.
    connection - Variable in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Active SQLite connection used for all queries.
    contentPanel - Variable in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Panel that hosts the three settings sub-panels via CardLayout.
    control - package control
     
    CREATE_BUDGET_CYCLE_TABLE - Static variable in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    DDL statement that creates the budget_cycle table if absent.
    CREATE_CATEGORY_TABLE - Static variable in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    DDL statement that creates the category table if absent.
    CREATE_EXPENSE_TABLE - Static variable in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    DDL statement that creates the expense table if absent.
    createCard(int, int) - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates a fixed-size card panel with a dark background and a subtle border.
    createErrorLabel() - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates a hidden error label styled in red, shown only when JComponent.setVisible(boolean) is called with true.
    createFieldLabel(String) - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates a small secondary-colour label used above input fields.
    createMainPanel(LayoutManager) - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates a dark-background panel suitable for use as a main content area.
    createNavBar(String) - Method in class ui.BaseScreen
    Builds and returns the shared vertical navigation bar.
    createNavButton(String, boolean) - Method in class ui.BaseScreen
    Creates a styled navigation button with left-aligned text and no border.
    createNavItem(String, boolean, Runnable) - Method in class ui.BaseScreen
    Creates a single navigation item consisting of an optional active indicator strip and a clickable button.
    createNavSubLabel(String, int) - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates a secondary-colour nav sub-label (e.g., current cycle month).
    createNavTitleLabel(String) - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates the large bold app-name label used in the nav bar logo area.
    createNormalButton(String) - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates a compact normal button, used for inline actions like "Add" or "Reset".
    createNumberSpinner(int, int, int) - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates a dark-themed integer spinner within a given range.
    createPieChart() - Method in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Configures and returns the pie chart wrapped in a fixed-size ChartPanel.
    createPrimaryButton(String) - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates a primary action button with a white border outline style.
    createSecondaryButton(String) - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates a secondary (muted) button with a filled field-colour background and no border, used for cancel or less-prominent actions.
    createSubLabel(String, int) - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates a plain secondary-colour subtitle label.
    createSubNavBar(String) - Method in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Builds the secondary vertical nav bar for switching between settings sections.
    createSubPanel(LayoutManager) - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates a slightly lighter sub-panel, used for inner content regions.
    createTextField(String) - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates a dark-themed text field with placeholder text behaviour.
    createTitleLabel(String, int) - Static method in class util.UIFactory
    Creates a bold white title label.
    cycleBtn - Variable in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Sub-nav button for the Cycle panel.
    cycleId - Variable in class domain.Expense
    ID of the BudgetCycle this expense is recorded under.
    cycleManager - Variable in class app.App
    Manages budget cycle lifecycle (create, reset, end).
    CycleManager - Class in control
    Handles the lifecycle of a BudgetCycle: creation, retrieval, status updates, and deletion.
    CycleManager() - Constructor for class control.CycleManager
    Constructs a CycleManager backed by the singleton DatabaseHelper.
    CycleStatus - Enum Class in domain
    Enumerates the possible lifecycle states of a BudgetCycle.
    CycleStatus() - Constructor for enum class domain.CycleStatus
